steps.title: Link daytime to warning colors
steps.content: The first sentence says poisonous amphibians can migrate safely during the day. The next sentence explains that with the sun in the sky, their bright color patterns warn visual daytime predators.

steps.title: Choose the time link
steps.content: The needed transition points back to the daytime setting. Choice A signals contradiction, Choice C signals restatement, and Choice D signals an example; the sentence instead explains what happens in that daytime context. The answer is B.
